events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault: splice outside box, residential electrical, in-service. NEC requires splices in approved box/enclosure, 110.14 about electrical connections and splices? Actually NEC 110.14 is terminations and splices must be made in approved manner, equipment and conductors rated, etc. Splice outside box is non-compliant, likely fail, high risk (shock/fire). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete 100 (in-service). value 0. confidence high. findings: unprotected splice exposed, not in junction box, violates NEC. actions: de-energize, install approved junction box, re-splice with proper connectors, inspect. references: NEC 110.14, also 314? But only 110.14 provided. We can include NEC 110.14. Need valid JSON.
